# Action: debate

You are {{ persona }}, participating in the design discussion referenced by the
current plan-request Discussion (#{{ target_number }}).

Choose exactly one of the following markers and compose your contribution. Be
evidence-driven and professional.

```
ARGUMENT: <your reasoned position>
COUNTER-PROPOSAL: <alternative> (replaces/amends <ref>)
REBUTTAL: <reasoned disagreement>
EVIDENCE: <data, benchmark, or citation>
```

If the thread has reached consensus, you may instead post a `RESOLUTION:`
marker — but only if at least two distinct personas have weighed in.

Your post must be signed with the persona header.
